---
title: "Spatial microsimulation with R"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Morgane Dumont (2016). Spatial microsimulation with R. *CRC Press*."
date: "2016-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_spatial_2016"
citation-type: "book"
citation-type-label: "Book"
venue: "CRC Press"
doi: ""
publication-url: "https://spatial-microsim-book.robinlovelace.net/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Morgane Dumont"
abstract: "This work introduces the concepts and practical application of spatial microsimulation techniques using the R programming language. It covers data preparation, model implementation, and the visualization of synthesized population results."
---

**Type:** Book
**Venue:** CRC Press
**Year:** 2016

[URL](https://spatial-microsim-book.robinlovelace.net/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This work introduces the concepts and practical application of spatial microsimulation techniques using the R programming language. It covers data preparation, model implementation, and the visualization of synthesized population results.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Morgane Dumont (2016). Spatial microsimulation with R. *CRC Press*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@book{lovelace_spatial_2016,
	title = {Spatial microsimulation with {R}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	isbn = {978-1-4987-1154-8},
	url = {https://spatial-microsim-book.robinlovelace.net/},
	abstract = {This work introduces the concepts and practical application of spatial microsimulation techniques using the R programming language. It covers data preparation, model implementation, and the visualization of synthesized population results.},
	publisher = {CRC Press},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin and Dumont, Morgane},
	year = {2016},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
